chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No. 774 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A No.15233/2022. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 15.08.2023 Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. -x-x-x-x-x- None present for the applicant except Assistant P.G, Sindh. Same was the position of last date. In the circumstances and in view of directions contained under order dated 22.11.2022, instant Crl. Misc. Application is hereby dismissed in default along with pending application(s), if any. Consequently, interim order dated 22.12.2022 is hereby recalled. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
